title: Replace avatar GIFs with emoji placeholders

log.context: Replace avatar GIFs with emoji placeholders

Done. Here's what was done:

- Generated 4 emoji-on-black avatar GIFs (64x64) using NotoColorEmoji at native bitmap size, then downscaled: `pepe.gif` (🐸), `ronpaul.gif` (🏛️), `hume.gif` (🧠), `hasan.gif` (📺)
- Deleted 10 old variant GIFs: `pepe_a/b/c`, `ronpaul_a/b/c`, `hume_a/b/c/d`
- Committed and pushed to `main` on `bigclungus/clung.us` (commit `a99e5f9`)
- Posted confirmation to Discord thread `1487167776438091877`
